'''Dorsk 80''' was the genetic predecessor to [[Dorsk 81]]. He was much more conservative than either [[Dorsk 81]] or [[Dorsk 82]], and had fully expected Dorsk 81 to return to his former position at the Cloning facility. Dorsk 80 was killed when [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus]] attacked [[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]].
